title: HR Manager
description:
HR Manager - Tampines - US MNC Semiconduct

Responsibilities:

  • Lead Training and Development activities. Guide HR Administrator on training matters.
  • Identify training needs to support skills growth and business goals.
  • Analyze needs using the competency framework. Source and recommend suitable programs.
  • Act as an internal advisor on learning and development solutions.
  • Oversee Compensation and Benefits functions.
  • Ensure compliance with legal requirements and head office standards.
  • Benchmark compensation to stay competitive in the market.
  • Manage annual appraisal, merit increase, and promotion processes.
  • Propose salary adjustments and compensation packages.
  • Plan and manage bonus payouts within approved budgets.
  • Participate in annual budgeting activities. Monitor market trends and regulatory changes affecting compensation.
  • Maintain HR policies, procedures, and documentation. Liaise with HRI and HRMC.
  • Drive HR improvement initiatives and projects across the organization.

Requirement:

  • Degree holder preferably in HR Management.
  • Minimum 3 years in managerial capacity and preferably in manufacturing environment.
  • Knowledge of Singapore employment laws and regulations, HR best practices, C&B analysis and training related functions.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills ( oral and written).
  • Meticulous, flexible, open-minded and possesses a positive attitude.
  • Hands-on and be able to engage the teams.
  • Must have 24x7 manufacturing payroll experience.
  • Must have strong knowledge in Payroll, a little experience in Training.

For interested applicants, kindly send your resume in Word/PDF format to include the following in your resume including:

1. Current Salary

2. Expected Salary

3. Availability

4. Reason for leaving

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted applicants will be notified

By submitting any application or resume to us, you will be deemed to have agreed & consented to us collecting, using, retaining & disclosing your personal information to prospective employers with the services provided by us.

Nguyen Thi Doan | R23116355

RRecruiter Pte. Ltd. | 18C9514

postedCompany.description:
RRecruiter is an international recruitment agency specialized in headhunting for executives, managers and experts. We serve as a strategic partner to our clients, offering a turnkey solution to capture and deliver the top talent needed to complete successful projects by aligning with the unique needs of our clients. Our timely action plan significantly saves client’s time and costs.

Our passion is to deliver outstanding customer service to the companies and candidates that we partner. Developing long term and mutually beneficial relationships is the key to our success.

  • Recruitment Experts in Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Philippines & Indonesia market
  • Dedicated Key Account Personnel to handle client relationship
  • Unique database of candidates
  • Access to leading job boards and CV database
  • Extensive experience in sourcing and selecting for key position

More information: https://rrecruiterint.com/
